ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "organic_searches" INTEGER /* Number of organic searches */,
  "avg_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average session duration in seconds */,
  "bounces" INTEGER /* Number of bounces */,
  "exits" INTEGER /* Number of exits */,
  "new_users" INTEGER /* Number of new users */,
  "sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions */,
  "pageviews" INTEGER /* Total number of pageviews */,
  "avg_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders placed */,
  "bdr" REAL /* Bounce rate */,
  "cdr" REAL /* Click-through rate */,
  "cr" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  "product_adds_to_cart" INTEGER /* Number of product adds to cart */,
  "per_session_value" REAL /* Value per session */,
  "prc" INTEGER /* Product removal conversion rate */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "product_list_ctr" REAL /* Product list click-through rate */,
  "plc" REAL /* Product list conversion rate */,
  "checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue */,
  "clicks" REAL /* Number of clicks */,
  "cpa" REAL /* Cost per acquisition */,
  "roas" REAL /* Return on ad spend */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost per click */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate */,
  "seo_ranking" INTEGER /* Average SEO ranking */,
  "social_media_impressions" INTEGER /* Number of social media impressions */,
  "email_open_rate" REAL /* Email open rate */,
  "mobile_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of mobile sessions */,
  "desktop_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of desktop sessions */,
  "tablet_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of tablet sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of origin */,
  "city" TEXT /* User's city of origin */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "target_location" TEXT /* Target location for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign to which the ad belongs */,
  "ad_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advertisement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advertisement */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the advertisement */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the advertisement */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions of the advertisement */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate of the advertisement */,
  "ad_position" TEXT /* Position of the advertisement */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the product was viewed */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent viewing the product in seconds */,
  "referer_url" TEXT /* URL of the page that referred the user to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product involved in the action */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart to which the product was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_activity_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_activity_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cart */,
  "cart_date" TEXT /* Date the cart was created */,
  "cart_status" TEXT /* Status of the cart (e.g., active, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abandoned_carts" (
  "abandoned_cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abandoned cart */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart that was abandoned */,
  "abandon_date" TEXT /* Date the cart was abandoned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for cart abandonment (e.g., shipping cost, payment issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abandoned_cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abandoned_carts_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)
